resources.name: LLM OKF — GitHub-Synced Knowledge Base
resources.description: OKF as a RAG replacement: structured markdown synced from GitHub, deterministic navigation, no vector DB

resources.name: OKF Chat
resources.description: Query the OKF knowledge base synced from GitHub

resources.name: Knowledge Base
resources.description: Inspect the synced OKF knowledge base

resources.name: GitHub Sync
resources.description: Trigger and monitor GitHub repository sync

resources.name: Chat — Ask a Question
resources.description: Ask anything. Navigator reads index, selects relevant files from GitHub-synced KB, LLM answers with full context.

resources.name: Chat — Sample Query
resources.description: Example query targeting content from the synced GitHub repo

resources.name: Chat — Stream (SSE)
resources.description: Same as chat but streams tokens via Server-Sent Events

resources.name: Get OKF Index
resources.description: Returns the auto-generated index.md — the navigation file listing all synced knowledge files

resources.name: List All OKF Files
resources.description: Returns all synced OKF markdown files with parsed frontmatter metadata

resources.name: Trigger Manual Sync
resources.description: Fetches latest files from github.com/himnay/learning, creates OKF markdown for each, regenerates index. Returns sync result.

resources.name: Sync Status
resources.description: Returns the last sync result: status, timestamp, file counts, and any errors

resources.name: Swagger UI
resources.description: Open Swagger UI in browser at http://localhost:8090/swagger-ui.html
